documentation.description: Floor buttons arrays are a Boolean array on the range 0 to TOP_FLOOR.

array_types.name: DOWN_BUTTONS_ARRAY_Type
array_types.code:
type DOWN_BUTTONS_ARRAY_Type is
  array (Integer range 1 .. TOP_FLOOR) of Boolean;

array_types.name: FLOOR_BUTTONS_ARRAY_Type
array_types.code:
type FLOOR_BUTTONS_ARRAY_Type is
  array (Integer range 0 .. TOP_FLOOR) of Boolean;

array_types.name: UP_BUTTONS_ARRAY_Type
array_types.code:
type UP_BUTTONS_ARRAY_Type is
  array (Integer range 0 .. TOP_FLOOR - 1) of Boolean;
